hero.title: Web development without the circus.

process.description: Six structured stages that guarantee exceptional results in every web development project.

analysis.title: Analysis
analysis.subtitle: Research and strategy
analysis.description: We start by deeply understanding your business, goals, and audience. We analyze your competition, define the project scope, and establish a clear digital strategy that maximizes return on investment.

structure.title: Structure
structure.subtitle: Wireframes and flows
structure.description: We design the information architecture and navigation flows. We create wireframes that optimize user experience and facilitate conversion, establishing solid foundations for development.

design.title: Design
design.subtitle: Visual identity
design.description: We create a visual identity that reflects your brand's personality and connects with your audience. Every element is strategically designed to build trust and maximize conversions.

code.title: Code
code.subtitle: Technical implementation
code.description: We transform designs into clean, scalable, and optimized code. We implement advanced features, necessary integrations, and ensure your site loads fast and works perfectly.

testing.title: Testing
testing.subtitle: Quality control
testing.description: We perform exhaustive testing on all devices and browsers. We verify speed, functionality, and user experience to ensure everything works perfectly before launch.

deploy.title: Deploy
deploy.subtitle: Go live
deploy.description: We launch your website to the world. We configure analytics, implement SEO strategies, and train you to manage content. We include ongoing support to ensure long-term success.

showcase.subtitle: We're not just another agency. We're your technical partner committed to the success of your project. These are the reasons our clients choose to work with us.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions about our work process and services.

basics.question: What is a landing page?
basics.answer: A landing page is a web page specifically designed to convert visitors into customers or leads. Unlike a full website, it focuses on a single action: getting the user to register, buy, download something, or leave their contact details. It's ideal for marketing campaigns, product launches, or validating business ideas.

basics.question: What is an e-commerce or online store?
basics.answer: An e-commerce is a website where you can sell products or services directly. It includes a product catalog with photos and descriptions, shopping cart, payment gateway for processing cards or transfers, shipping system, and an admin panel where you manage stock, prices, and orders. It's your business running 24/7 without needing a physical location.

basics.question: What is a web application or SaaS?
basics.answer: It's software that runs in the browser without needing to install anything. Think of Google Docs, Notion, or Spotify Web. It includes complex functionalities like user systems, personalized dashboards, real-time data processing, integrations with other services. It's the solution when you need something beyond an informational website or basic store.

basics.question: What is a corporate website?
basics.answer: It's your company's digital presence: who you are, what you do, how to contact you. It includes institutional pages (About, Services, Contact), is optimized for SEO to appear on Google, and projects professionalism. Unlike a landing page that seeks a specific conversion, a corporate site is more informational and comprehensive.

basics.question: What's the difference between a website and a web application?
basics.answer: A website is mainly informational: you show content that the user reads (like a digital magazine). A web application is interactive: the user performs complex actions like managing projects, editing documents, processing payments. If you just need to display information and receive forms, it's a website. If you need users to do specific tasks with data, it's an application.

basics.question: Do I need technical knowledge to work with you?
basics.answer: Not at all. Our responsibility is to translate your business ideas into technical solutions. We speak in clear language, without unnecessary jargon. We explain every important technical decision and why we recommend it, but you don't need to know how to code or understand technology.

process.question: How long does it take to develop a web project?
process.answer: An optimized landing page takes 1-2 weeks. A complete corporate website takes 2-4 weeks. More complex web applications may require 1-3 months. We work with agile sprints and incremental deliveries so you see constant progress from the first week.

process.question: Do I need to have designs ready before starting?
process.answer: It's not necessary. Our process includes the complete design phase. We start from your idea or references you like, create wireframes, high-fidelity designs, and iterate with you until you're 100% satisfied before writing a single line of code.

process.question: What if I want to make changes during development?
process.answer: Changes are a natural part of the process. During development, we have weekly reviews where you can request adjustments. Minor changes are included. For major changes that modify the original scope, we present options and adjust timeline and budget transparently.

process.question: What technologies do you use and why?
process.answer: We mainly work with React, Next.js, and TypeScript for the frontend, and Node.js for the backend. They are modern technologies, proven in production by companies like Netflix and Airbnb. This ensures your site is fast, secure, easy to maintain, and any developer can work with the code in the future.

pricing.question: How do prices work?
pricing.answer: We offer reference ranges according to the type of project. The final price is adjusted based on specific scope, required functionalities, necessary integrations, and timeline. The first consultation is free of charge: we talk about your project, give you an honest estimate, and prepare a detailed proposal.

pricing.question: Do you include hosting, domain, and maintenance?
pricing.answer: Hosting and domain can be included or you can use your preferred provider. We offer maintenance plans that include security updates, daily backups, 24/7 monitoring, and technical support. You can also manage it yourself once the project is delivered.

pricing.question: Do you accept installment payments or payment by stages?
pricing.answer: Yes, we work with payment by stages for medium and large projects. Typically: 40% at the start, 40% mid-development, and 20% at completion. For smaller projects, we can split it into 2 payments. We accept transfers, cards, and cryptocurrencies.

support.question: Do you offer support after launch?
support.answer: Yes, all projects include 30 days of post-launch warranty for bug fixes. We also offer monthly support plans that include updates, monitoring, automatic backups, and priority attention for changes or new functionalities.

support.question: Can I make changes after it's done?
support.answer: Absolutely. We deliver the complete source code and documentation. You can make changes yourself, hire another developer, or hire us for future updates. There's no vendor lock-in: it's your project and you have total control.

support.question: Do you train me to manage the site?
support.answer: Yes, we include training sessions according to the project. We teach you to update content, add products (in e-commerce), review statistics, and do basic administrative tasks. We also leave written documentation and tutorial videos to consult whenever you need.

software.title: 1. Software Licenses
software.description: All web products and services developed by TangoDev are subject to the following license conditions:
items: The client acquires an exclusive usage license for the contracted project.
The source code remains TangoDev's property until full project payment is completed.
Once payment is finalized, usage rights are transferred to the client.
Redistribution or sale of the code without written authorization is prohibited.

content.title: 2. Content Licenses
content.description: Content provided by the client (text, images, videos) must be free of copyright restrictions.

thirdparty.title: 3. Third Parties and Dependencies
thirdparty.description: Projects may include open-source libraries subject to their own licenses (MIT, Apache, etc.). TangoDev guarantees compliance with all third-party licenses used.

updates.title: 4. Modifications and Updates
updates.description: Updates and modifications after project delivery may be subject to additional agreements and may generate additional costs.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: General conditions for using our services

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.description: By hiring TangoDev services, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you should not use our services.

services.title: 2. Description of Services
services.description: TangoDev offers web development services including but not limited to: website development, web applications, e-commerce, landing pages, APIs, and cloud services.

payments.title: 3. Payments and Billing
items: Payments will be made as agreed in the service contract.
An initial deposit is required to begin work.
The remaining balance must be paid before final project delivery.
Late payments may result in work suspension.

responsibilities.title: 4. Client Responsibilities
responsibilities.description: The client is responsible for providing content, information, and materials necessary to complete the project. Delays in providing these materials may affect delivery timelines.

warranties.title: 5. Warranties and Limitations
warranties.description: TangoDev guarantees that the work will meet the agreed specifications. However, we do not guarantee specific business results nor are we responsible for the client's business decisions.

cancellations.title: 6. Cancellations and Refunds
cancellations.description: Cancellations must be communicated in writing. The initial deposit is non-refundable. Payments for completed work will not be refunded.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we protect and use your personal information

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.description: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:

usage.title: 2. Use of Information
usage.description: We use the collected information to:
items: Communicate with you about your project

sharing.title: 3. Sharing Information
sharing.description: We do not sell or rent your personal information. We may share information only in the following circumstances:
items: With trusted service providers (hosting, payments) who need the information to perform their work

security.title: 4. Data Security
security.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, loss, or destruction.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
rights.description: You have the right to access, rectify, delete, or request the portability of your personal data. You can exercise these rights by contacting us at tangodev08@gmail.com

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: Information about the use of cookies on our site

what.title: 1. What are Cookies?
what.description: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide a better user experience.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: They are necessary for the basic functioning of the site and cannot be disabled.

performance.title: Performance Cookies
performance.description: They help us understand how visitors interact with the site by collecting anonymous information.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.description: They allow the site to remember your preferences to provide enhanced and personalized features.

thirdparty.title: 3. Third-Party Cookies
thirdparty.description: We may use third-party services (such as Google Analytics) that also set cookies. These cookies are subject to the privacy policies of those third parties.

management.title: 4. Cookie Management
management.description: You can control and/or delete cookies as you wish. You can delete all cookies that are already on your device and you can set most browsers to prevent them from being placed.
management.warning: Please note that if you disable cookies, some site functionalities may not be available.

moreinfo.title: 5. More Information
moreinfo.description: For more information on how to manage cookies in different browsers, you can visit:
